title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY 1, 1948 TO JUNE 30, 1949 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

chunks.text:
H. No. / 45 OG No. 1, 142 (January, 1949)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 320, June 19, 1948 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY 1, 1948 TO JUNE 30, 1949 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

Itemized portion omitted for lack of space
